rule_adherence.notes: fs access stays in main process, typed IPC via contextBridge, every-layout Stack, logical properties, modular-scale tokens, and Promise.all for recursion all respect the binding rules.

simplicity.notes: Recursive FileTreeNode and a small builder with no superfluous abstractions or restating comments.

spec_compliance.notes: Typed FileNode[] tree, expand/collapse, selection with active style, Vitest unit test, Stack with logical-property nesting, and a 'No files found' empty state all satisfy the acceptance criteria.

visual_posture.notes: Tree styled via tokens on data-selected/hover with mono-scale spacing and ellipsis truncation, matching the sidebar navigator intent.

summary: Clean, well-tested file-tree slice that meets every acceptance criterion and binding rule with no violations.
